title: Prune Everything
story: Your Docker host is running out of disk space. Clean up all stopped containers, unused images, unused networks, and dangling volumes in one sweep.
objectives: Remove all unused images (not just dangling)
hints: `docker system prune -a --volumes` cleans everything at once (with `-a` for all images)
Or run individually: `docker container prune`, `docker image prune -a`, `docker volume prune`, `docker network prune`

initialState.summary: Many stopped containers, unused images, and dangling volumes pre-created
